name: devconcept
description: DevConcept: Lean, Standard, and Full workflow routing; requirements alignment; planning; agent templates; observable TDD; debugging; review; finishing; and compounded learnings.

interface.shortDescription: Lean, Standard, and Full senior-engineering workflow routing.
interface.longDescription: DevConcept packages reusable skills for correctness-first development: Lean / Standard / Full mode routing, first-action core bootstrap, requirements alignment before non-trivial edits, lightweight durable planning for long tasks, runtime-aware subagent dispatch, agent templates, observable red-green test-driven behavior changes, systematic debugging, parallel design-space exploration, plan review, subagent review, honest finishing, and durable session learning capture.
defaultPrompt: Route the task through Lean, Standard, or Full mode.
Use subagents when dispatch triggers hit and the runtime/user instructions allow them.
Use a planning ledger for long-running work.
Explore design alternatives for this interface.
Compound durable learnings from this session.
